chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3505 of 2023 Muhammad Aslam Parekh Versus Mrs. Munnaza & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on Misc. No.16358/23 3. For orders on Misc. No.16359/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 27.05.2024 None present. -.-.- Since last two dates petitioner and his counsel are called absent. They were called absent on 15.09.2023 when by way of indulgence the matter was adjourned followed by their absence on 31.01.2024. Today being third date of hearing and position is same and there is not intimation either, it seems that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Accordingly, petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
